messages.authLogin: A new login to your account was detected. If this wasn't you, please secure your account immediately.
messages.orderCreated: Your order {{orderId}} has been successfully created. Total: ${{orderTotal}}.
messages.orderFailedUponCreating: Your order could not be created due to an error.
messages.orderStatusChanged: Your order {{orderId}} status has been updated to {{newStatus}}.
messages.orderRefunded: Your order {{orderId}} has been refunded. The amount will be returned to your original payment method.
messages.orderPaid: Payment for your order {{orderId}} has been confirmed.
messages.orderFailed: We were unable to process your order {{orderId}}. Please contact support if you need assistance.
messages.orderProcessed: Your order {{orderId}} has been processed and is being prepared.
messages.orderShipped: Your order {{orderId}} has been shipped and is on its way.
messages.orderDelivered: Your order {{orderId}} has been delivered. We hope you enjoy your purchase!

errors.accessDenied: You are not allowed to access this notification.
